title: The Impact of India’s Slowdown on the Commonwealth

summary.about: How slower Indian growth affects trade and investment across Commonwealth economies.
summary.audience: Commonwealth trade ministries, development agencies and exporters.
summary.method: Uses GTAP analysis for 2020 plus a qualitative product-and-country assessment.
summary.insights: The largest effects fall on India’s exports to least-developed and Sub-Saharan countries and imports from developed Commonwealth members.
